description: These thong sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with wide woven straps. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses, ethnic wear and jeans.UpperMetallic macrame thong straps for a snug Fit and extra comfortWoven toe separator for added comfortSynthetic leather lined footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heel for enhanced gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
